title: API Query Parameters with Default Values
scenario: Create a prompt to generate API documentation for a GET request to the '/products' endpoint with query parameters 'name' and 'price'. Ensure the output includes default values for each parameter and an example usage.
constraints: Must include example usage and default values

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the word count and formatting constraints.
Verify if the output includes default values for each query parameter.
Evaluate if the output includes example usage for the API request.
